memberdef.argsstring: (FlexDirection direction, FlexWrap wrap, FlexJustify justify, FlexAlign alignItems, FlexAlign alignContent)
memberdef.name: FlexLayoutManager

briefdescription.para: Measures the view and its children.

detaileddescription.para: This method calculates the desired size of the view based on the constraints and the sizes of its children.

briefdescription.para: Arranges the children within the view bounds.

detaileddescription.para: This method positions and sizes the children within the given bounds according to the layout algorithm.

parameterdescription.para: The internal view whose children to arrange
The available bounds for arranging children

detaileddescription.para: Passed to LayoutImpl constructor by FlexLayoutImpl. Subclass to customize flex layout behaviour.
